content.en:
The Ultimate Dark Domain was very far away from the multi-dimensional realm, and the eight Ultimate Realm Masters kept shuttling, but it still took a long time to finally reach the Ultimate Dark Domain.

"That's the Ultimate Dark Domain!"

Mi Tian Ji Zun Dao.

Ye Tian looked and saw darkness in the distance, and he couldn't perceive anything.

Wow!

The eight Ultimate Realm Masters directly entered this dark area.

Airplanes!

An inexplicable barrier stopped them, but after the Heavenly Extreme Venerable waved his hand, a void gate appeared, and the eight Ultimate Realm Masters directly entered.

......

"There are so many formations and palaces!"

Ye Tian looked around, countless formations were superimposed in this area, and there were a large number of palaces echoing each other, and there might be an Ultimate Realm Lord sitting in each palace.

Soon.

Mitian Jizun took Ye Tian to his palace.

"Several, you will choose an empty palace as a mansion at will, and you need a mark to enter and exit the Ultimate Dark Domain, otherwise it will be blocked by the formation here, and I will help you get the mark later." "

"Your job is to guard this place, and the ultimate creatures will often come and attack and try to rush out. Of course, if you want to go into the depths of the Ultimate Dark Realm and hunt those ultimate creatures, you can do it, but you need to be very strong, otherwise it will be easy to fall. "

Mi Tian Ji Zun reminded. 860

"Mitian Extreme Venerable, we understand that we will not casually go to the depths of the Dark Domain!"

An Ultimate Realm Master.

Immediately, the Extreme Venerable took them to collect the seal, and then chose the palace.

......

Ye Tian stayed in the Ultimate Dark Domain, and saw a lot of Ultimate Realm Masters, and there was also a steady stream of Ultimate Realm Masters coming over.

The multi-dimensional realm alone can send several Ultimate Realm Masters over, and some other powerful dimensional heaven and earth can naturally also send Ultimate Realm Masters over.

Gradually, the number of Ultimate Realm Masters in the Ultimate Dark Realm at least doubled.

In this way, the crisis here has been temporarily alleviated.

this day.

Dense packs of ultimate creatures are coming.

"All Ultimate Realm Lords prepare to fend off these Ultimate creatures!"

One by one, the first-grade Ultimate Realm Masters ordered.

Whoa!!

Many Ultimate Realm Lords came out of the palace, and countless formations were urged to suppress the Ultimate Creatures here.

After that, the Ultimate Realm Masters fought against these Ultimate Creatures.

Ye Tian naturally also made a move.

He was immediately surrounded by three ultimate creatures, and the aura of these three ultimate creatures had all reached the Ultimate Realm Lord realm.

"Eternal Night Abyss Knife!"

Ye Tian used this joint ultimate dimensional killing move, and used an ultimate weapon long knife to slash it over.

Tear and pull!

The void of the Ultimate Dark Domain was torn apart with a single sword, and one of the Ultimate Creatures couldn't stop such a move, and was directly killed by a single sword.

In terms of strength, Ye Tian had already reached the second rank of the Ultimate Realm Lord, and these Ultimate Creatures were only the third-grade Ultimate Realm Lord combat power, and their strength was extremely weak compared to him.

In a short period of time, Ye Tian killed the three-headed ultimate creature.

But soon, an ultimate creature with extremely terrifying strength killed Ye Tian, and it did not allow Ye Tian to continue to kill like this, otherwise many weak ultimate creatures would be killed.

Thundered!!!!

Ye Tian fought with this ultimate creature, but it was difficult to hurt the other party, the opponent's strength was no less than him, and his body was very tough and strong.

And Ye Tian also noticed that in a certain area, the Mitian Extreme Venerable and they were besieging an ultimate creature similar to the appearance of the Golden-winged Dapeng, the other party's aura was too terrifying, and the Mitian Extreme Venerable and they were all weaker, so they could only barely kill him.

Time passes slowly.

Seeing that they couldn't get out, the ultimate creatures all retreated.

"Thirteen Ultimate Realm Lords have fallen!"

Ye Tian frowned slightly.

In such a short period of time, so many Ultimate Realm Lords have fallen, which is really a heavy loss, and you must know that it takes a long time for the Dimension Sea Birthday (CEDH) to give birth to an Ultimate Realm Lord.

But this is also something that can't be helped, if there is no guardianship of these Ultimate Realm Lords, once these Ultimate Creatures of the Ultimate Dark Realm rush out, it will be a disaster.

In addition to the thirteen Ultimate Realm Masters who were killed, there were also many Ultimate Realm Masters who were severely injured.

However, the ultimate creatures in the Ultimate Dark Realm have also suffered a lot of losses, and they should not dare to come back in a short time.

Another time passed.

this day.

Ye Tian was ready to enter the depths of the Ultimate Dark Domain to find an opportunity.

It would be a waste of time to stay here.

He talked to the other Ultimate Realm Lords and set off directly.

......

The depths of the Darkest Realm.

Ye Tian condensed the copy body of an ultimate creature here, and he was one of the ultimate creatures killed by him, so it was definitely safe to wander here as an ultimate creature.

He then proceeded with the ultimate creature replicating his body, searching for possible fortuitous treasures.

Time passed slowly.

this day.

Ye Tian's ultimate creature copied his body and found a treasure land, which was a black mountain, and drops of black liquid flowed above the black mountain.

Some of the ultimate creatures are here, devouring the black liquid.

As they devour, their physical fitness is improving, and the rate of improvement is not bad.

"This should be a resource that can increase physical strength!"

Ye Tian guessed.

But in fact, it is difficult for the Perfection Ultimate Body to continue to improve, even Ye Tian has no way to quickly improve his physical fitness at present, he can only improve the Perfection Ultimate Body by improving the Ultimate Rules, and more perfectly control the Perfection Ultimate Body, so as to exert a more powerful strength.

However, these black liquids might be able to strengthen his perfect and ultimate body.

Thereupon.

He passed, and began to snatch some black liquid from other ultimate creatures, but instead of refining it, he kept it in his body and handed it over to the real body to copy when he returned.

And just like that, the long years passed.

Ye Tian also collected a lot of this black liquid, and then left here, making contact with his real body in a safe area, and handed over all those black liquids.

After that, Ye Tian's copy body returned to the place where the Ultimate Dark Realm Lords were guarding.

......

"It's back!"

Ye Tian returned to his palace here, and then began to refine those black liquids.

I saw that the strength of his body began to gradually increase under the tempering of this black liquid, and his perfect body seemed to be undergoing an unknown transformation.

"What's going on?"

Ye Tian was very curious.
